heading: Waiver of mediation rights by borrowers
label: 2006 Waiver of mediation rights by borrowers
text: The Secretary may not make, insure, or guarantee any farmer program loan to a farm borrower on the condition that the borrower waive any right under the mediation program of any State.
notes: Amendments1994— struck out “agricultural loan” before “mediation program”.Pub. L. 103–354
amendments: Amendments1994— struck out “agricultural loan” before “mediation program”.Pub. L. 103–354
